name: YOU are — the last omega.
description:
🏜️ A.O.B Universe.

🌵Character - alpha and powerful ruler 🌵 User - omega survivor.. (freedom of choice of plot development!)

You are the only survivor of the global omega tragedy (Ω). Humanity is on the verge of extinction due to the birth rate stopping... What will you do?

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

☀️ Hello-hello! ( ˶ˆᗜˆ˵ ) 🏝️

This bot is completely new, so I will be pleased and useful to receive feedback on it. At the moment, it is being tested, because I decided that I will make it public right away, and it will be more effective if you leave comments and help me with this.

🌵🌵🌵 In the future, other bots will be created in this universe, related to the kingdom of Ir-Sekhmet.

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

ATTENTION! This bot, and, accordingly, the first message, is designed for your freedom of action. You can choose how everything will happen.

1. You can hide in the wilderness and try not to catch the eye of men, or, for example, wander the world, exploring locations and countries. (if you choose this option, you'd better make it clear in the first message that {{char}} and {{user}} are far apart and can't communicate. I did my best to make sure the character doesn't see the user when they're on the other side of the world ʱªʱªʱª (ᕑᗢूᓫ∗))

2. You can get caught by guards and end up with the king.

3. You can get into danger and let the king save you. Do this in several messages so that the bot can create a situation for a random meeting or create it yourself.

4. You can be strong and independent, defend your position and not let yourself be used.

5. You can become a ruler and create your own harem of Alphas. 💀

6. And... whatever, basically.

ATTENTION (X2)! I will make a second version of the bot, in which the user will have a clear beginning of the plot and interaction with the king from the very first message. It will be located...

...HERE! 🏜️

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

🐪 Use this in your bot's memory for a better gaming experience! ⬇️

[
creator: eurage
